features.evidence: Also received a usb/lightning charging cable that looked like new. I was especially surprised to see the battery health at 92%; it looks brand new with no scratches or damage at all.

There are scuffs on three corners, scratches front and back, and little pits on the screen, along with the general wear that happens to a screen. This is my second attempt to purchase a used iphone through amazon - the first time, the device screen display was glitchy, and even with free returns it takes time and resources to print out the shipping labels/repackage the product/find a drop-off point, and sellers do not refund initial product shipping fees.
value: display pixel density: 460 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)

features.evidence: This phone is well built, fast so it runs IOS 26 well, and is a joy to use. I prefer Android,
Bought this phone recently as a spare device for a vacation trip - was able to add an eSim easily, and take lots of beautiful photos with the camera.
given the performance so far, and price of this product at time of purchase compared to the next lowest cost option from apple, for about 1/3 the cost I think this was a very solid purchase.
